signals.npcLine: Signal board shows Fear pressure. Keep your routes adaptive.
signals.questPulse: Map three unstable relay corners before the next SAM sweep.
signals.worldFeed: Network mood: Fear. Surveillance pressure remains high.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden relay mark: look for the glyph where east lanes cross old neon rail.

signals.npcLine: Trend signatures rotating: AXS · APE · RAVE. Couriers are rerouting tonight.
signals.questPulse: Intercept two phantom couriers carrying unsigned signal chips.
signals.worldFeed: Ops pulse: district relays are shifting faster than normal.
signals.clueEvent: Clue pulse: seek a dead terminal with three blinking amber bars.

signals.npcLine: A rumor says the old tunnel net is awake again.
signals.questPulse: Trace a memory shard path without triggering patrol beacons.
signals.worldFeed: World feed: encrypted whispers detected under Revolt blocks.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden link hunt: the passphrase starts with moon and ends with static.
